expectations.evidence: Found dedicated store file at video-player-store.ts. It uses `create` from 'zustand', defines `VideoPlayerState` interface with all playback/UI state and actions, and exports `useVideoPlayerStore`.
expectations.text: 创建了专门的 zustand store 文件（如 stores/player-store.ts）

expectations.evidence: VideoPlayerProps defines exactly 3 props: `videoUrl` (string), `videoRef` (RefObject), and `callbacks` (VideoPlayerCallbacks, optional). The component accepts only these 3 props, which is well under the 5-prop limit.
expectations.text: VideoPlayer 组件 props 数量不超过 5 个

expectations.evidence: Every state subscription in VideoPlayer uses single-field selector pattern, e.g.: `useVideoPlayerStore((s) => s.isPlaying)`, `useVideoPlayerStore((s) => s.currentTime)`, `useVideoPlayerStore((s) => s.volume)`, `useVideoPlayerStore((s) => s.muted)`, `useVideoPlayerStore((s) => s.playbackRate)`, `useVideoPlayerStore((s) => s.capturing)`, `useVideoPlayerStore((s) => s.play)`, `useVideoPlayerStore((s) => s.pause)`, `useVideoPlayerStore((s) => s.togglePlay)`, etc. The `selectError` helper selector is also used for the related error fields.
expectations.text: 组件从 store 读取状态使用单个字段选择器模式（如 useStore(s => s.videoUrl)）

expectations.evidence: Actions in the store combine state mutation with side effects: `play()` sets `isPlaying: true` and invokes `_callbacks.onPlay?.()`; `pause()` sets `isPlaying: false` and invokes `_callbacks.onPause?.()`; `togglePlay()` reads current state and delegates to play/pause; `setCurrentTime(time)` sets time and invokes `_callbacks.onTimeUpdate?.(time)`; `setPlaybackRate(rate)` sets rate and invokes `_callbacks.onRateChange?.(rate)`.
expectations.text: 播放控制方法在 store 中作为 compound action 实现

expectations.evidence: Line 74 of video-player.tsx: `export function VideoPlayer({ videoUrl, videoRef, callbacks }: VideoPlayerProps)` uses function declaration syntax (not arrow function or class component).
expectations.text: 使用了函数式组件声明：export function VideoPlayer()

expectations.evidence: All notification callbacks (onPlay, onPause, onTimeUpdate, onRateChange, onCaptureFrame) are combined into a single `callbacks` prop of type `VideoPlayerCallbacks`. In usage-example.tsx, the parent passes `callbacks={{ onCaptureFrame: ... }}` as an object rather than spreading individual callback props.
expectations.text: 相关的 props 组合成对象传递而非扁平展开

claims.verification: VERIFIED. Code comments list the original 15 props and show the new interface has exactly 3 props: videoUrl, videoRef, callbacks.

claims.claim: Internal state (isPlaying, currentTime, volume, muted, playbackRate, capturing, hasError, errorMessage) is managed via zustand store
claims.verification: VERIFIED. All listed state fields are defined in the store's initial state and managed through store actions. The component subscribes to them via useVideoPlayerStore selectors.

claims.claim: Parent can imperatively read/write state via the store using getState()
claims.verification: VERIFIED. The usage example shows `const { pause, setVolume } = useVideoPlayerStore.getState()` for imperative access, and demonstrates reading `currentTime` and `isPlaying` via selectors.
